name: Taco Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a lightly greased 13-inch quiche dish (or one 13 x 9-inch pan or two 9-inch pie pans) with tortillas, tearing them if necessary.
3. Brown the ground beef and onion together, then pour off any drippings.
4. Add garlic, chili powder, oregano, cumin, thyme, and salt to the meat mixture. Stir to combine.
5. Spoon the meat mixture into the dish.
6. Top with cheese.
7. Beat eggs and sour cream together and pour over the filling in the dish.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until set.
9. Spread sour cream on top of the quiche.
10. Arrange sliced avocado, lettuce, and tomatoes on top.
11. Garnish with whole ripe olives.
12. Serve with salsa, if desired.
